Los Angeles Pest Control

Pest Control

Comprehensive pest management for Los Angeles homeowners. We eliminate the bugs and keep them away with our quarterly treatment schedule and free re-treatment guarantee.

Get a Free Quote

What's Included

✓ We Treat

  • ✓ Ants (all species)
  • ✓ Cockroaches
  • ✓ Spiders
  • ✓ Fleas
  • ✓ Flies & Gnats
  • ✓ Wasps & Hornets
  • ✓ Mosquitoes
  • ✓ Beetles
  • ✓ Silverfish
  • ✓ Earwigs
  • ✓ Centipedes & Millipedes
  • ✓ Stink Bugs
  • ✓ Crickets
  • ✓ Aphids
  • ✓ Box Elder Bugs
  • ✓ Pill Bugs

✗ Not Included

  • ✗ Termites (separate treatment required)
  • ✗ Bed Bugs (specialized treatment available)
  • ✗ Wildlife removal
  • ✗ Structural damage repair

Custom Treatments Available

Have a specific pest problem not listed? We offer custom treatment plans for bed bugs, termite prevention, and other specialty pests. Contact us to discuss your situation.

Ask About Custom Plans →

Quarterly Treatment Schedule

Year-round protection tailored to seasonal pest activity

Q1

Spring

Ant colonies, wasp nest prevention, perimeter barrier

Q2

Summer

Mosquitoes, flies, hornets, outdoor activity pests

Q3

Fall

Indoor pest-proofing, spiders, crickets entering home

Q4

Winter

Cockroaches, rodent-adjacent pests, interior treatments

Get a Quote — 50% Off First Treatment

Family Owned · Licensed & Insured in California

Our Treatment Process

1

Inspection

Our technician inspects interior and exterior areas to identify pest activity, entry points, and environmental factors contributing to the problem.

2

Treatment

We apply EPA-registered products to targeted areas — perimeter, entry points, nesting areas, and high-activity zones. Interior treatments use products safe around family and pets.

3

Follow-Up & Monitoring

We schedule quarterly follow-up visits to maintain protection. If pests return between visits, we come back at no charge — that's our guarantee.

Start Enjoying Pest Free Living Today

Don't wait — pests won't.
